content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Presents". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/136/A
constraints: Each child is represented by a unique integer from 1 to n
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of children. The second line contains n space-separated integers representing the list of children.
content.outputFormat: Output the list of children in the order they will receive the presents.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Create an adjacency list to represent the circle of children, then traverse the list to find the order in which the children will receive the presents.
